dataErrors.source: PumpPortal may have stopped sending ticks, or our refresh failed
pump.fun API returned fake MC, our filter should have caught this

errorAccounting.possiblePpErrors: PumpPortal can misclassify buy/sell (txType), report stale solAmount, or silently drop subscriptions
errorAccounting.possibleOurErrors: MC direction override could flip sells to buys, nursery promotion could miss high-potential tokens, floor detection with thin data
errorAccounting.possibleApiErrors: Pump.fun API can return phantom MC (real_sol=0 but high usd_market_cap), stale ath_market_cap, or incorrect complete status
